entries.name: Favourable Wind
entries.description: Good speed, clear sea, and enough visibility to spot distant sails.

entries.name: Hazy Horizon
entries.description: Heat haze makes ship identification difficult.

entries.name: False Calm
entries.description: The sea is easy but watch crews feel exposed. A perfect day for pursuit.

entries.name: Patchy Fog
entries.description: Fog banks allow ships to hide, appear or vanish suddenly.

entries.name: Rain Curtain
entries.description: Heavy rain creates moving walls of cover across the sea.

entries.name: Crosswind Chase
entries.description: Fast sailing is possible but risky. Pursuit or escape becomes dramatic.

entries.name: Lanternless Night
entries.description: A dark night with poor moonlight. Stealth at sea becomes easier.

entries.name: Red Dawn
entries.description: The sunrise stains the sea red. Sailors call it a warning.
